name: United States ex rel. Eisenstein v. City of New York
question: For an action filed under the False Claims Act, does the 30-day or 60-day time limit apply for filing an appeal when the United States is not a party in the lawsuit?
description: A case in which the Court held that the 30-day limit for filing a claim under the False Claims Act applies when the United States is not a party to the lawsuit.
